title: Trigger finger
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Trigger finger can cause catching, locking, pain, or stiffness in a finger or thumb.
Supportive care may include rest, splinting, and clinician-directed pain control.
Infection, trauma, tendon rupture, neurovascular symptoms, or specialist-directed plans require separate handling.
